mapper.select: SELECT att.*,v.vol_name,a.act_title FROM ATTENDANCE att LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON att.vol_id=v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON att.act_id=a.act_id WHERE att.attend_id=#{attendId}
SELECT att.*,v.vol_name FROM ATTENDANCE att LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON att.vol_id=v.vol_id WHERE att.enroll_id=#{enrollId}

SELECT att.*,v.vol_name,a.act_title FROM ATTENDANCE att LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON att.vol_id=v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON att.act_id=a.act_id WHERE att.vol_id=#{volId} ORDER BY att.create_time DESC
SELECT att.*,v.vol_name FROM ATTENDANCE att LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON att.vol_id=v.vol_id WHERE att.act_id=#{actId}
SELECT att.*,v.vol_name,a.act_title FROM ATTENDANCE att LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON att.vol_id=v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON att.act_id=a.act_id ORDER BY att.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET checkin_status=#{checkinStatus} WHERE attend_id=#{attendId}
